title: AGENTOBS FencePayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2 — Payload for structured output constraint events in the llm.fence.* namespace. Fences enforce that model outputs conform to a declared schema (JSON Schema, Pydantic model, regex, etc.) and manage retry loops when the model produces non-conforming output. Three event types: llm.fence.validated (output passed schema check), llm.fence.retry.triggered (output failed; retry initiated), llm.fence.max_retries.exceeded (fence gave up after exhausting retries).

FenceValidatedPayload.title: FenceValidatedPayload
FenceValidatedPayload.description: Payload for llm.fence.validated — the model output passed all structural constraint checks.

fence_id.description: Unique identifier for this fence constraint configuration.

schema_name.description: Human-readable name of the output schema or constraint being enforced.

attempt.description: 1-based attempt number on which validation succeeded. 1 means the model produced valid output on the first try.

span_id.description: Links this fence event to the span whose output was validated.

validation_duration_ms.description: Time taken for schema validation in milliseconds.

FenceRetryTriggeredPayload.title: FenceRetryTriggeredPayload
FenceRetryTriggeredPayload.description: Payload for llm.fence.retry.triggered — the model output failed schema validation; a new model call will be made.

fence_id.description: Unique identifier for the fence constraint configuration.

schema_name.description: Human-readable name of the output schema.

attempt.description: 1-based attempt number that failed. This retry will be attempt + 1.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts configured for this fence.

violation_summary.description: Concise description of the schema violation. MUST NOT include raw model output (§20.4). Use field paths and error codes.

output_type.description: Type of structural constraint that was violated.

span_id.description: Links this fence event to the span whose output failed validation.

FenceMaxRetriesExceededPayload.title: FenceMaxRetriesExceededPayload
FenceMaxRetriesExceededPayload.description: Payload for llm.fence.max_retries.exceeded — all retry attempts have been exhausted without the model producing schema-conforming output.

fence_id.description: Unique identifier for the fence constraint configuration.

schema_name.description: Human-readable name of the output schema.

attempts_made.description: Total number of attempts made before giving up.

final_violation_summary.description: Description of the constraint violation from the final failed attempt.
examples: Required field 'entities' still missing after 3 attempts

output_type.description: Type of structural constraint that could not be satisfied.

span_id.description: Links this fence event to the span.

total_extra_cost.description: Accumulated extra cost incurred by the retry attempts (excluding the cost of the first attempt).
